title: Giantex Portable Mini Compact Twin Tub Washing Machine 20lbs Washer Spain Spinner Portable Washing Machine, Blue+ White

I have been very pleased with my purchase as well as the customer support I have received so far.

My only complaint is that the drain hose is a poor quality piece. The design underneath allows for the hose to be directed to the left or right but I knew that if I attempted to switch the direction the hose would fail. It felt brittle, so I never disturbed it.

physical_breakage: The spinner broke after 3 months..... Now i have to buy something else. Not happy.... 2 stars because it cost the same as going to the Landry matt this whole time. Would not recommend to anyone.

electrical_fault: Love this machine. I add detergent and cycle it 1.5 times then I drain add more water with softener and cycle it another time+ drain and add a few pieces to spinner at a time and spin up to 3 times per load depending what's in it. Mine broke after 3 weeks due to electrical problems but that was probably on my side due to RV issues.

I'm pretty disappointed! When I first received this washer I was excited until I open the box and the Machine was wet and dirty as if it had been used I thought it was supposed to be new. I loved how it worked! It lasted for about 11 months of regular use. I did maybe two loads a week, sometimes I would fall behind and do three or four loads in a week. It could handle linens also- one set of microfiber wires sheets at a time or three towels. noise_vibration: I have had this product just over a month and already the spin dryer stopped working, only makes a very loud noise and no spinning.  Very disappointed.  Ordered a different brand with a much better rating.  Save your money, do not buy this product!

After 15 uses, the spin dryer broke. It spins, but the entire machine moves, meaning that the thing travels across the floor, and the water isn't extracted. I am about to move and will not be needing this anymore, so I'm not fussing with trying to fix it. From other reviews, it sounds like this is a common problem.

I also had problems with fuzz collecting on my clothes. And, even on the

Love the washer! The dryer side however broke down already and it has only been about a month since I got it. I’ve been careful not to load up the dryer with super damp clothes and I have only used it a few times. It was very noisy and shook a lot from the very first time I used it, I might have gotten a damaged one. The size is perfect.
heating_failure: I have used this everyday for three months, only today to have the spinner/dryer start smelling like burning plastic/rubber. [[VIDEOID:22a5c0afd76ebd7e116170a4f3d1e4b4]] I purchased this 3/26/22. It was intended to be used in a small cabin we have (family of 3). Our 1st time using it was 6/1/22. I really wanted to love this min washer
rust_corrosion:
Over a year old and love the purchase. Be careful not to get the dials wet.. the numbers and such are wearing off.. but you learn your machine and know where you want things.

Update: We’ve has the machine for over two years now and it finally bit the dust (the spin dryer side). Somehow the machine was getting water inside and one of the pieces that runs the spin cycle rusted and snapped
I got one of this two years ago, and now it's ttly down. It worked pretty good at the beginning, but a year later, noisy up, screws/springs of those timers all rusted and functions failed.
control_failure:
Just doesn't last. Count on a cheap washer for light use, don't expect it to last. Use it carefully, don't overfill it with heavy loads. The smaller loads, the better. Is a heavy consumer of water when compared to a typical washer that can handle a full size load. This takes a lot of water to wash tiny loads.

This portable washer lasted for 8 months and was used prob an average of 3 to 4 times per week. It was handy for small loads.  Now, the spinning side no longer drains water.  No real instructions on how to fix, except by trail and error or pay someone.  Was hoping it would have lasted a year. You get what you pay for.
